fields.description:
`rebar show`/`get-file-impact` (jq reducer in ticket-lib-api.sh) and
`list`/`search`/native (Python ticket_reducer) are two hand-written reducers that
have drifted. Confirmed by code + experiment. Resolve by making the Python reducer
the SINGLE source of truth.

## Reviewed plan (3 opus reviews: accuracy+prototype, maintainability, performance)
Performance reversal: the jq reducer is the SLOW path (O(events × jq fork); ~910ms
@121 events). Python reduce_ticket is ~31-35ms flat. So we DROP the bash cache
fast-path (saves only ~12ms, adds a drift hazard) and adopt the simpler fallback:
delete jq, route show/get-file-impact through reduce_ticket (which already has its
own .cache.json fast-path). Faster than today on every input; no degradation.

Confirmed: a VERIFY_COMMANDS processor mirroring jq's last-write-wins semantics is
correct AND fixes a latent bug (verify_commands is silently dropped on compaction
today). Drift inventory was incomplete: the jq->python swap also surfaces internal
keys jq never emitted — `parent_status_uuid`, `last_status_env_id`, and
`preconditions_summary.source_count` — so an interface-boundary presentation filter
must strip them uniformly across show/list/search/llm (to_llm leaks them too).
Deleting jq breaks tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_schema_parity.py (asserts >=2
jq programs) — must be retired and replaced by a golden full-key parity test.

## Ordered child tasks (T1-T5)
- T1 VERIFY_COMMANDS processor in ticket_reducer (+ make_initial_state/make_error_dict) + unit test; fixes compaction drop.
- T2 Interface presentation filter: strip internal keys (parent_status_uuid, last_status_env_id, preconditions_summary.source_count) from show/list/search/llm; fix to_llm.
- T3 Delete both jq reducer copies (ticket-lib-api.sh:340,1409) + the separate jq preconditions scan; route show + get-file-impact through reduce_ticket; preserve not-found envelope, stderr bridge-alert warning, exit codes, --format=llm, multi-id, []-on-miss.
- T4 Golden cross-reducer parity test (full key-set + value equality across show/list/search/native + llm over all event types); retire test_ticket_reducer_schema_parity.py.
- T5 Update ticket_state.schema.json (verify_commands optional; internal keys excluded); optional follow-ons: writes refresh cache; library/MCP call reduce_ticket in-process.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] show, list, search, native reduce_ticket (and --format=llm) return identical, internal-marker-free top-level shapes for the same ticket (incl. verify_commands when set)
- [ ] verify_commands survives compaction (SNAPSHOT carries it)
- [ ] jq reducer fully removed; single Python reducer is the only state producer
- [ ] golden full-key parity test guards against future drift; old jq-asserting test retired
- [ ] no performance degradation (reduce_ticket path is faster than the old jq path)
- [ ] schema updated; no regression in existing reducer/show/list/get-file-impact tests
